case_title: ANDREW KALAKAILO VS. WOODS REMOLDING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KALAKAILO, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS REMOLDING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KALAKAILO, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODS REMOLDING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,805.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA (AS ASSIGNEE FOR ANDREW KALAKAILO) AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS REMOLDING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
